notes: GntR-family transcription regulators. First-pass curation is complete for all 29 genes; the split is represented in the GntR-family transcriptional regulator boundary module. The curation separates FadR/GntR C-terminal, UTRA/HutC-like, and PLP/aminotransferase-domain regulator candidates, keeps DNA-binding transcription factor activity as the shared core function, and leaves effector ligands, target regulons, regulatory direction, and PLP-domain substrate chemistry unresolved.
